branch.frontier_task_title: v6.8 release closure: ship Executable Quality Ledger
branch.branch_summary: Complete TASK-079 v6.8 release closure: write release definition, checklist, and notes; run quality-ledger-audit, release-state-audit, organization-verify, CLI help benchmark, npm test, and smoke; refresh active release state only when release evidence is complete.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-079 sits on v6.8 after shipped v6.7.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Close v6.8 as the Executable Quality Ledger release: make QIF-relevant evidence changes appendable and auditable while preserving the boundary that ledger pass is traceability evidence, not semantic truth.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-079: v6.8 release closure: ship Executable Quality Ledger
